creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
I can't find any ports that have run-time dependency on py-setuptools_scm7 at this time, so I'm inclined to just close this bug.

It's fairly rare to have this problem in the ports tree.  So it's just a bit of an inconvenience for people trying to build ports quickly (without having to spin up poudriere other other isolation methods).  There's also not that many that currently require py-setuptools_scm7 (yet).
